svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(232, 245, 233), rgb(21, 33, 22)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(46, 125, 50), rgb(100, 168, 104));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 198px; height: 1px; padding-top: 95px; margin-left: 11px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #2E7D32;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#2E7D32, #64a868); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;
